fomod.Name: Inspect Weapons Expanded
fomod.Author: NWBArk2020, fsttime
fomod.Description:
An expanded version based on fsttime's original Inspect Weapon addon for STALKER Anomaly. Original addon: Inspect Weapon, and Inspect weapon for FireModeCheck - fsttime [https://www.moddb.com/mods/stalker-anomaly/addons/mcminspect-weapon]
Added feature: * Inspection key input mode: Now you can choose between key press or key hold to trigger inspection animation. * High quality Depth of Field effect: Choose whether to enable high quality Bokeh DoF during the animation or not. * Hide in-game UI during inspection: Choose whether to hide in-game UI or not during weapon inspection.
This addon depends on Ascii1457's Screen Space Shaders, make sure you've installed it first. Screen Space Shaders - Ascii1457 [https://www.moddb.com/mods/stalker-anomaly/addons/screen-space-shaders]
